text: T-Mobile is the worst! I have spent a week trying to get my old service restored because I didn't even have service where I lived and they promised I did.  They have now locked my phone that I bought from ATT years ago...it didn't even come from them! Save yourself hours of trouble! Dont switch!

Customer service usually works with you because it’s a whole pandemic. Not to mention their site was just breached and my information is out everywhere. I’ve gotten an extension before to pay the next day now all of a sudden they will no longer do it when I have a positive history. Been a customer for years, really thinking about changing especially after this breach.

My fiance became a customer in December 2020, and by the end of January 2021, he moved out in order to do a complete home remodel.  

He paid for 4 months of service even though no internet was used.  (Approximately $200+)

Once he moved back in, the less-than-6-month old router wouldn't connect for service.  We contacted customer service, and the agent sent us a new router immediately.  

I asked what to do with the other router, but since it was defective, she didn't think it would need to be sent back...BUT...watch for an email just in case.

Nearly 2 months passed (no email), so the router was discarded (by us).

The only email we received was to tell us we were going to get charged $490 for not returning the old equipment.

(It gets worse.)

I'm on my THIRD phone call to T-Mobile to find resolution.  (Mind you, these take approximately 2 hours each.)

Long story short, they were going to pause the auto-withdrawal of $490 so they could review the audio recordings of the phone calls and then call me within 7 days to let me know of their findings.

Anyway, they haven't done ANYTHING they have promised, and on top of that, pulled the $490 payment from our checking account the DAY BEFORE we leave for Mexico, so...

I feel I should not only get the $490 equipment fee refunded, but now after all of this, the $225 we paid in order to "do the right thing" during the home remodel.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION

I have never experienced worse customer service or witnessed such a blatant display of incompetence in my 46 years as I have while dealing with this carrier. I was attempting to move 3 lines of service over to TMobile. 1 line from ATT, 1 line from Verizon, and buy T-Mobiles mobile hot spot solution. Sounds simple, right? Should be a 20 minute phone call seeing as I have already passed the credit check and verified the portability of the two active phone lines? Not so fast. It has been a month now and I still (thankfully at this point) do not have TMOBILE service. I received a partial order shipped to my house with half of it missing or not processed. I have spent to date approximately 6 hours with their customer agitation line. I honest to God should of simply pounded my head against a brick wall. Never once was my order repeated correctly, never once did my "selected" plan remain the same, and at no time ever did the customer service rep repeat back to me the correct plan. They prompltly billed me for 170 dollars a month ago but I yet to have one device on their network. Next week I will load up the pieces and parts of what they shipped drop it off to a Tmobile store and consider myself lucky this did not work out. It appears I owe ATT a big fat apology for calling them the worst and looking to leave. I consider myself lucky to be abused by ATT and will now be a happy ATT customer for another 20 years. (I am currently still on hold now with TMobile for the last 25 minutes.) The short version: T-Mobile gets an F and that seems to good for what I have experienced.

T-Mobile sucks. You can't go anywhere with out the data turning off. It will turn off when ever it wants and it may take a little while or it may take hours for it to come back on. I do not recommend this provider at all.

I had a wonderful experience at T-mobile in Glen Elyn, Il. Sunday 8/22/21 @ 3 p.m..  Miguel the manager was very friendly, courteous, professional, and knowledgeable.  I would definitely go back if I had any issues with my phone service or iPhone.

I read all these reviews & now I’m afraid to install new SIM! Also had read on the News this Month of Aug 2021, That T-Mobile was hacked?! I’m a former Sprint user still. Just worried!! & how this whole thing to switch doesn’t seem all that fully sought out, But a development through glitchy services that haven’t quite compared Sprints Coverage or reached its convergence & capacity as a Network of quality coverage.

I made the mistake of leaving Verizon and joining my girlfriend on her T-Mobile account to take advantage of the BOGO iPhone. SCAM. First, it took 2 days for both of our new phones to work on the network. Mind you, my gf’s phone number was already a T-Mobile number. Next lie, we both asked for 512gb phones, the rep lied and said they only make them in 128gb. It felt wrong at the time but I couldn’t fact check because my old phone was already off of Verizon. Finally, get the phones working and on day 4, my phone starts doing this weird matrix glitch. I call customer service where they tell me to go to the store. I call the store I made the purchase, they have no more iPhones. I call a near by store “we can’t help you, you have to go to the other store.” What?? Are you serious right now? I haven’t regretted something this bad in like 20 years and I’m only 38.

I was robbed by the store manager along with at least a dozen others that I know of .
I want to warn people that T-Mobile it’s self 
Didn’t want to fix the problem they told me I’d have to go after the manager as a person 
Not as T-Mobile????
He charged a dozen new phones to a account I did not open it was into the thousands..
I had to contact the state police and have the report to prove it along with all the messages 
From the store manager..
Just be careful with T-Mobile you don’t matter as a person..

Thier customer service is great compared to atnt and Verizon, at one point they offered me a refund and a cancel of all my services, which renewed my faith in them. Their service though is bottom of the barrel, I was in the town of Oneonta, and my service went from 30mbps to 1 Mbps. The service is never over 30 Mbps, this is 5 g remind you. My friends always making fun of me cause when we do the speed test battles he always gets over 100 with Verizon. 

They give you 100 gbs, but it's because they know you can't go over it haha. I manly got TMobile for streaming my PC to my tablet, which is impossible almost all the time. It works some times. They really need to stop lying about their 5g being the best, it isn't even as good as Verizon's 4g , and Verizon's 4 glte is up to 10 x faster. If you want the worst service out of the 3 than TMobile is it, it's also the cheapest. They do have the best customer service out of the 3 though. Verizon is god awful, and so is atnt. 

The finally straw for me is they lost every one's information, and only found out because the attacker told them on a forum.

edits.text: I cannot believe how great tmobile customer service is. They 100 percent listen and respond with not just no action, we are sorry for your problem. I have had all cell phone companies, spectrum, sprint before tmibile bought them, verizon, and atnt. Tmobile is by far the best customer service I have ever witnessed from a phone company.

text:
I always heard that T-mobile phones have poor reception, always for many of my friends.
A dear friend got into problem with ID stolen and T mobile didn't check ID or any form of verification to ship new phone and plan to criminals! She didn't know until phone insurance company contact her in her current address (not the T-Mobile)!  No phone company will do this! Sadly, my friend tried very hard to have the phone cancelled but refused by T-Mobile and they claimed that their Fraud team is doing investigation forever long (> 2 weeks??). It shocks me as it's a behavior to help criminals than the honest Americans!! I felt so sorry for my friend having to suck up with this kind of selfish companies! They seem to only care for $$...

If I could give TMobile 0 stars I would. We contacted T-Mobile through the T-Mobile website Express that we were coming from MetroPCS to T-Mobile we'd like to bring our phones over and put our numbers in on a recorded conversation the T-Mobile sales rep told us that we could bring our phones over no problem. When we got our SIM cards to the mail I put it in the first phone everything worked fine I put it in the second phone and it said the phone was locked when I called T-Mobile back up I have to wait for 3 hours for a customer service to get on the line when they get on the line they tell me buy a new phone I tell them that they lied to me to get me to sign this contract and they still have not fixed it I've had one phone line instead of two for a week. If you're thinking about switching to T-Mobile I would highly suggest that you check in everything go to all the websites because T-Mobile will lie to you to get you to sign a contract and don't care if they do.

We used a prepaid phone from t-mobile for 15 years but made the mistake of trying to upgrade. Spent several days with "customer service" people who seemed to only know how to say "reinstall SIM." Finally gave up and cancelled service losing about $40 that was on our account.

Our 2 phones arrived in a damaged box with no packing material. The box was left on top of the trash can. We have called customer service at least 10 times to get the phones up and running and have been on hold 30 minutes and then disconnected. One of the phones has a defective battery and Tmobile tells us it's not their problem. They also say we owe them $200 and have discontinued our service.
T-Mobile SUCKS. The WORST customer service of ANY PHONE we have ever had.

Their customer service is great, but their coverage is horrible as the only T-Mobile phone carrier on my vacation… needless to say I was the only one who didn’t have service through out the trip.  On my way home guess who’s switching to Verizon me me!  Horrible experience and this isn’t  my 1st rodeo with their coverage.  For me coverage matters and it’s worth paying the cost for a better coverage.

With the switch to 5G, I had to get a new Android device to be compatible. The representative told me over the phone that they would also send me a Samsung watch for free, no monthly payments. Luckily, I found out that the watch was actually a new line that was being added to my plan! And that I would have to make monthy payments on it. Indeed, if I would not have found out on time, I would have gotten into a new line agreement, and binded to make monthy payments on it for a long time. That's terrible!

Horrible If you don't have this carrier don't get them go to at&t or Verizon I been having such a horrible experience since I got with them in 2018 this is not a good phone company at all T-MOBILE SUCKS!!!!!!!!!!!!

went on website to trade in iphone8 and it said i'd receive 365 dollar trade in value, even had a pop-up and estimated payments. Get a text saying its been accepted at $70. then talking to support they tell me the trade-in offer ended today. 
I can sell my phone at third parties for $100-180. They low ball the trade-in value so hard after turning back on the trade-in offer. This companies new CEO is a clown, yet they'll make millions for running a company into the ground.

One of the phones on my plan was damaged and a claim was made on 8/11/2021. The fifty dollars was paid for the insurance on the eleventh of August. I was in contact with the T moble third party insurance on the thirteenth finding out what the hold up was on the claim. I was told the person with the damaged phone could call on Monday the sixteenth and the processing should be done and that the company (assurance) had everything they need. When I asked how my daughter who is in Hawaii would call on a destroyed phone he told me that was my problem and hung up. So Monday I called with mo help. Tuesday they stated I need to provide my drivers license and I did. Friday the twentieth still no process on the claim or the phone. T moble said they won't credit my account and it's not their problem. My daughter is in the Army and needs her phone for work, T moble stated they don't care. So T Moble doesn't appreciate the military and they don't care about customers.  I will not stand by a company that won't stand by the military or by there word.

Update: after posting this T moble corrected the problem and apologized. That means a lot for me because most companies won't care. T moble has restored my faith in them.

I applied for a phone on line. all went well and waited for sim card to be sent in the mail. Card arrived, not compatible with my phone. Went to local T-mobile store.. told I need new phone but it would required a deosit.  Was told I could order one one line.  I did, but on line also requires a deposit.  This Is understandable but I am not in a position to comply until September 3 (social security payday).  Now recieved a bill due for a service I can use or don't have.  On line customer service says "sorry about that"  I have no options to let someone know I do not plan on paying for something I don't have yet.  Not my fault ths sim card won't work, and T-mobile jumped the gun.  My suggestoin is the bill be canceled and the billing start when I actually make or receive a phone call.

Charged $500 for deposit at t-mobile store. Called Sprint to see why the balance did not reflect the deposit. Sprint stated that we paid $349 and they did not know where our money went but justified it by saying "it probably went towards fees."Sprint is unable to tell me what "fees." The phone was paid off and one month later they still have our phone locked. Attempted to get help at t-mobile store but without listening to the issues they stated we need to contact Sprint. Phone was to be unlocked on 8-5, they lied, then again on 8-18, the lied. Today 8-20 they want us to go back to sprint  service for 40 days so that we can "qualify" to unlock a phone that we paid $1200 for it.

People are nice, service is awful.
We have always had pleasant in store experiences.  But our experience with actually using the service has been miserable.  In the past 10 years or so we have been with Verizon, Sprint and Xfinity and T-mobile has by far been the least consistent.  Texting is a misery.  If I'm connected to wifi they won't send at all 50% of the time.  If I connected to cellular then they will send 90% of the time.  But regularly I have to put my phone in and out of airplane mode to get anything to send. We have a signal booster at our house and it says full bars but still has all the same issues.  These were our first 5G phones.  Which somehow is slower than our 4G phones and unless is have full or 4 bars minimum the internet won't work at all on cellular service.  Prior we had 4G on Xfinity and it worked on 2-3 bars, just slower.  This on anything less than 4 won't work at all.  As soon as we can we a moving to a different carrier.

Can't believe that I am having so many problems trying to cancel service that they can't even provide. Signed up for home internet and the signal is so weak I stopped trying after working with technical support several times. Gave up after 1/2 a month and got another service. They went ahead and took payment out of my bank and refuse to cancel. I'm not on any contract and was told I wouldn't be charged while my signal was weak. They are high pressure sales and liars.

I wish I read all these reviews before I switched from Verizon.  WORST SERVICE. Dropped call..do not even get the calls.  Goes straight to messages. Never tells me I have a message..customer service has no clue.  I have this phone that is totally useless.  Never had a problem with Verizon.  And they tell me nothing they can do go back to Verizon but will be billed $1,009 for phone.  How professional of T-MOBILE

I know ATT is not good, but Tmobile is even worse in my neighborhood in Northwest Queens, New York City.  I use an android phone, with ATT I can receive and make calls and send and receive txt inside the house. My wife there is a good deal from Tmobile, and ask me to switch.  She uses an iphone, can barely get enough signal to function normally,but my android phone, absolutely obsolete, no txt no calls in and out, a warning "no mobile connection" every time a try to make a call.  Very mad, very mad.  I never like Apple, there are too many  limitations. 1. the charger, 2, the headset, 3, the music format must be AAC, download from Apple store, while mp3 is much more universal.  4. never able to use micro sim as extra storage.  Conclusion is that Apple is not environmental friendly at all.  5.  Much more expensive, that is why Apple is ripping customers off.  Now with Tmobile's weak signal, it is helping Apple to destroy our environment more.

I was at store winter heaven, I had the most amazing experience ever,in a cellphone store, I was help by an amazing young woman,FRANCHI,and an amazing young man,by the name ABLE, I absolutely love the detail attention by both,making sure I understood, plansof cell phone, different phone, I was blown away, I NEVE EVER had that experience always making sure I understood every detail, ❤ 💙 So much was my satisfaction that I joined Tmobile, Thank you Tmobile for hiring these 2 ,I'm definitely will recommend This company and this particular Store, THE EXPERIENCE WAS AMAZING, THANK YOU, FRANCHI,AND ABLE ,  MARIA

Ever since sprint merged with t mobile the service has been a night mare. I signed up back in April 2021, to get a new phone and a new agreement, after several attempts over a span of two months, sprint canceled  my order then told me I could get the same phone in another color. Not only did they change my order but they changed my agreement price. I am very dissatisfied with sprint , have been a loyal on time paying customer for over 9 years. The service is horrible, my phone stops working in certain areas, sometimes I can not get a dial tone, the connections is interrupted, never ever had these problem before. I would never ever recommend them to anyone, now they have a data breach  Aug 2021, that was first reported on the news 2 days earlier before they warned their customers. Their prices are higher. When my agreement end, I will be done with them. Please find a better company. Also when you call customer service you have to keep explaining your complaints to a bunch of people who you can barely understand. This is the worse and I truly hate this company and their policy. This company is ripping people off and need to be investigated. They also erase notes off of your account.

I second what the reviewer who said, "If I could give them a minus I would."  T Mobile could not provide service to a T Mobile device. I called customer service and they gave me the runaround for 5 months and charged me $600 out of nowhere. Called to resolve the issue and they did not have a record of the paperwork they sent me, saying there was nothing they could do about it. Switched to Verizon. Great reception and service. Boo, thumbs down, you suck T Mobile. 0/10 do not recommend.

T-mobile connectivity has been going downhill for about 3 months to the point of where my phone goes out of service at random points during the day at my house in San Francisco. I've called but keep getting the run around. Their reps always start by blaming my phone even though I've kept records showing it works fine in other areas. They have been telling me they would look into it of two months now and if anything, it's gotten worse. Now, I read that they've been hacked AGAIN! They're promised 3 times in as many years that they had their security under control. The fact is, they don't care about their customers, just pretending their a "star." I'm switching tomorrow.

I was a long-time Verizon Wireless customer. Yesterday, our family switched to T-Mobile simply because T-Mobile offered my father a $1,000 credit on a $1,800 phone that he wants to buy. After I switched to T-Mobile, I could not use my phone for more than 12 hours because it was locked to the Verizon network. Then, when I tried to make or receive calls, the person on the other end could not hear what I was saying. David Sando, the manager of the Fullerton Amerige Heights Town Center store helped me by giving me a new SIM card. As soon as I got home, I began to experience the same exact problem. When I try to make or receive calls, the person on the other end cannot hear what I am saying. Tomorrow, I am going back to Verizon Wireless. T-Mobile phone service sucks.

T-Mobile has the WORST service out there! I used to have Spring and they were terrible so we switched to T-Mobile because they merged and we figured service would be SO much better.  BOY were we wrong. Every where we go we can't even send any pictures with texts and forget getting on almost ANY site unless you are hooked up to wi-fi.  They are the WORST!!

Tmobile  sold us insurance  for a note8.
Then yrs later we bought a note 10 transferred the number from the 8 to the 10 we were told insurance stayed with the note 8 we try to use said insurance for the note 8 they tell us no our insurance goes with the cell number! 3 employees  on different dates told us the insurance stays with the cell phone! How about training the employees to tell the exact same lie so that. Every employee  tells the same lie. To the Employee laughing on the other end you just lost our tmobile business  of 4.6yrs to another carrier Verizon  wont lie they just charge an arm for their services!

If I could rate (Minus) I would,
just make sure that if you ever use t-mobile and happen to change carriers, when you call to transfer or cancel your numbers, PLEASE make sure that you are not still being charge, I had 3 lines, call to transfer 2 and cancel the 3rd and because of "miscommunication" I was still with the 3rd line active and being charge with a FAMILIAR PLAN even tho the system only showed ONE line "active" It has been by far one of the worse experiences with mobile carriers. I WOULDN'T RECOMMEND IT!

Loved the Service we receive Key and Madison are a 10. The finest service. Excellent
Store#659D
5645 N.Atlantic Ave #107
Cocoa Beach, Fl 32931

Total nightmare. We transferred from Verizon to T-Mobile on March 27, 2021. T-Mobile offered us a free watch. Do not accept. It is not free. I called upon receipt and stated that I didn't want it as my wrists are small and asked for a return label or address to return it. I was told it was free so it was ok to toss it which I did. Since then I get a Sorry To See You Go letter with a bill for $256! I spend over an hour each time being transferred around until I'm assured its been adjusted to zero owed. Nope. Got another bill yesterday. That makes it the 5th month.

Im a current customer have been for a few years. The phone service was good for the first year+ but the last year+ service has gone to s@#"*t. In the middle of cedar rapids my phone struggles to have reception. As well as in surrounding towns in a 30+ mile radius. I'm so sick of this crappy ass company claiming they have the best service every where in the US.  Lies,lies,lies

Worst customer service. They do not communicate between representatives effectively. Upon switching service in April of 2021 I received a final bill for $66. Paid that in full the day it was received. A month later I received a credit alert stating they had sent that same balance to collections. Called back in to TMobile and customer service representative convinced me to make another payment to remove this from collections. I did in an effort to get things resolved. They asked me to send 3 months worth of bank statements and everything seemed to be settled reassuring me they would take care of everything and refund the extra payment. It is now August and I am still waiting for this issue to be resolved. When I call in to find out any updates representatives argue saying they don't owe me any refunds or see any notes about what I'm talking about in my account. These customer service representatives have little to no integrity. They will lie and deceive to get your money.

Had to give them 1 star because its as low as you can go. The service is the worst that I have ever had. My phone is always saying not connected to a network. I'm without coverage almost as much as i have it. DO NOT SWITCH TO THIS COMPANY

I have had Sprint for over 20 years.
T-mobile is a joke! There service sucks.
Do not use there sims card if you still have sprints. It sucks.
 Do not trade in your phone because it's a scam.
They give you the credit over 24 months for your old phone so you cant pay off your new phone early.
Scammers is what they are!

My experience with TMobile I received a letter in June saying I owe $216 for a line that I never open so I call to talk to them they reassured me that they would close the account and I had to talk to the fraud the and I did it I did everything they ask me to do for the fraud situation now I receive a letter from the credit bureau stay to pay the amount or settle out so I call T mobile to see what was going on and they telling I have to pay or take the letter in to headquarters first of all I’m not paying for a service that never open up and I Have AT&T as my carrier and I have a iPhone 12 Pro Max why would I down great for and Android phone I don’t even kno what kind of phone it was on the account check y’all name with T mobile and make this didn’t happen to you please everyone read this

Extremely frustrating when you have a problem and you trying to solve it calling their customer service department, no matter what number you call you will be answer either in the Philippines or in Mexico or El Salvador and when you ask TO BE TRANSFER to an America location they will said that "there is no way to be transfer to talk with an American agent". The problem is not about racism is about they have a book to follow and they do not take any decision out of that book because, they are afraid of loosing their customer(Sprint) and on the other hand is really hard to understand when they talk with their accent. 
98% OF THE TIMES YOU ENDS WITH NO SOLUTION TO YOUR PROBLEM.

Biggest mistake. I will NEVER get T mobile again and will NEVER recommend it to anyone. Issue after issue with T-Mobile and they will tell you one thing and SURPRISE your bill will tell you different. Let alone, the time it takes to speak to a representative they are just horrible.

Everyone who reads this there is a law suit on going for t mobile it is called fair shake. I have a law suit on them. You can get 100 to 500 dollars. The firm takes out for using them they are helping me. They can help you.

edits.text: This company is a joke. They charged me for a phone I already paid for. Started to bill me 48.00 for what. I called T moble service and she didn't even now what it was for. Scammers also they shut off my phone after a paid a whole damn month of service. Back to Verizon. They f=== up.

text: I needed a new phone was not sure what kind or what to get, SCOTT at your Antioch store on orchard Street was FANTASTIC! The other employees in the store seemed extremely helpful supportive and all their customers seemed happy. Normally I avoid going into the stores because it's usually a long wait, Scott and the store are great

I had a crazy experience at T Mobile it took me 3 days to get a phone…..3 whole days YALL because my phone was DONE!  But I must say the sales rep BRANDON was Amazing he help straighten things out  if it wasn’t for him I probably would have walked away with no regrets!!! So Rhanks again BRANDON at the T mobile store on Buckley and Quincy by Lowe’s!

Overall, I'm very pleased with T-mobile; much better customer service and tech support than AT&T, which I dumped 2 months ago. During the day, U.S. based reps, so easy to talk to and knowledgeable.  They seem to care about customers.  Their robo/scam/telemarketing call blocker isn't as good as AT&T's, but it's better than nothing.  Both companies do the minimal amount for free to comply with new federal law, but want another $5/month for better "Premium" version.  Unfortunately, the people in their stores are your typical untrustworthy  salespeople who'll say anything to make the sale, but their online staff is great.

Took me 5 minutes just to even load the page to get to this review, their service is the worst especially after taking over sprint. Worst choice I’ve ever made and I can’t wait to switch service providers. Plus they offered me a deal about bringing my old phone back and I’ll pay less on my monthly bill and when I did they never honored the agreement and when they switched to T-Mobile they told me the deal was with sprint and there’s nothing they can do.

Absolutely the worst customer service with Comcast coming in a photo finish second place. After one of my phones was damaged that was warrantied, they sent me a new phone and I sent the damage phone back to T-Mobile. This occurred on May 19th 2021. In mid June I received a letter in the mail that they never received my device. I called T-Mobile and they said the phone was in quarantine to disregard the letter. A week later, I received an email that my device was never received. I called them again and they claimed I sent the wrong device in which I vehemently denied that was possible. Over the course of the next 6 weeks, it was finally discovered in their warehouse and was scanned in. They issued a refund for $299 and 11 cents because they had took it out of my account when they took my monthly payment out at the same time equaling $492.72. When I called them about this, on August 1st, they issued the first refund. Only to find out the next day I received an email that I could not be refunded. I called them again. They said it wasn't processed properly so they issued another refund I got an email two days later saying that was denied. I called them again, they said again it was processed in the wrong way. To this day August 13th 2021, I have not received my money. I pay them $60 a month for the insurance for three phones and I paid them a $99 deductible for the damaged phone and yet they still took the $299.11 and will not refund my money now because it is the next billing cycle. And they're supposedly going to now credit my account for the $299. They only do this to ensure that they get their money and then I stay with them for another month. What a joke! I have been with them for 6 years. Good riddance to bad rubbish! Little do they know that I am canceling them so they have to send me a check. Do not get them they are simply the worst.

I switch to AT&T because T-Mobile wouldn't give me a discount on upgrading my phone, AT&T was cheaper(even with getting the newest iPhone), and bundled with my home internet to save additional money.

When switching, I paid T-Mobile in full, the rep said I would not owe T-Mobile any more money. T-Mobile doesn't contact me again. I now have collectors contacting me because T-Mobile is now saying I owe them money. I call T-Mobile to see what's going on, they can't pull my account up because I don't remember my pin, and will not let me make a payment on it. 

I do not recommend this company!

When I was a younger adult it was not like this. It just seems like these days no company is dignified in any way. I happen to be a senior on social Security. T-mobile was quick to take my money but have not been prompt in returning it. This seems to be the case with the many companies I deal with. This morning I got another email out of many saying they had received all the items I sent back and I sent them back over a week ago. It's not like they're in another country.
 After receiving them back, they wrote it would take up to 5 days to verify the contents! 5 days! Then it may take up to 10 days to get my refund! 
I signed up with T-mobile and got a plan, on July 31st. Within just 4 days, not even a week with them, I cancelled my service agreement.
All those days I had nothing but issues and was on the phone with T-mobile all day long. Some said I'll call you back which never happened, also some said they would text me back, that never happened either. I had some say, "I'm your superwoman I'm going to fix all these issues.' Never happened. I must have spent the entire 4 days talking to about 50+ agents! Stressed out to the max and didn't even eat much for 4 days.
 Not one resolved my issues. Finally the 4th day I had spent another whole day on the phone with them up until past 10pm at night. That's when I threw up my hands and said, 'That's it, I'm done' and started the refund process.
I still have not been refunded! That money is held up in my account and I need it back.
I thought Cricket was bad and Apple too, but T-mobile is far worse than any company I've ever had to deal with ever. The very worst. I didn't think that was possible.
Now, I have no phone because I sent them back and because I have not gotten my refund I didn't have that money to get a plan elsewhere.
T-mobile has been my worst experience ever in my whole life ever, and I'm nearly 67 years old now. And I have done business with many, many companies in 5 decades. I so wish I had never signed up with them but that's pretty useless to say now.

They absolutely suck. Lack of reception , long time customer that pays like 250 per month. Wanted to change my plan and they won't deal because this months bill bot paid yet. I pay the damn bill every month no issues. I don't recommend them and am switching carriers.

TMobile started locking random phones. I bought iPhone from BestBuy, carrier free and paid in full. Later one i wanted to use it with different carrier and found out that it is locked to tMobile. When i called them they said that sometimes their system locks phones which are in use for a while with them and that happens by mistake and automatically. So they locked iPhone which was never purchased from them, never locked and AUTOMATICALLY! In my opinion they robbed me and put my in emergency. I supposed to be getting phone ASAP because unlocking process takes couple days. I spent 2 days already and iphone still locked, still no answer from supervisors, managers etc. I spoke to Perry and Britney, managers of customer care department IDS: 74107 and 10526. All they can say we are sorry but we can not do anything only other offline department handles it. I told them that this is not fair and unusual, and i need that phone ASAP because have to leave it with my kid and parents, please do emergency unlock or what ever you have - still nothing. Britney said that they've done everything on their side and Apple holds unlocking process, I spent another couple hours with apple and they said they have nothing to do on their side, operator ONLY can do unlock. So they locked phone with no permission or reason, they ruined my vacation because I had to run around a city in search of the other phone, i spent days on a phone with support department because they lied to me. I hope somebody will sue them for billions, this is the worst customer service i've ever saw at a corporate like that.

I wouldn't even give this company 1 star I paid on a phone and service for 18 month it didn't work most of the time and when I was finished with the contract they wouldn't shut the service off until I gave the phone back which was supposed to be free with the contract but I paid for!!! What a joke I will never do business with the company again!!!

I've been with Sprint forever and always had great service with no calls dropping or breaking up. I traded in my iphone when my contract was up because I thought the phone was having issues with dropping calls. I got a new iphone and sure enough it is still happening and might I say even worse. I don't live out on the Rotunda in a remote area I live in a populated city and shouldn't be having these issues. I will not be renewing my phone in the future with T-Mobile again. It is down right embarrassing to be taking a call and people cannot hear me. I am going to have to buy another phone from another company to get me through these long two years that I'm tied to this company. I hope T-Mobile hears our complaints and does something quickly or they will be losing many more customers!!

We have a 4-line family plan, originally with Sprint, but now obviously Sprint is being swallowed up by T Mobile.  1 of the 4 lines was always unused (our youngest wasn’t yet ready for a phone). Now she’s ready, so we went to T Mobile store to activate a used iPhone 8, a hand-me-down from a grandparent.  3 days later and T Mobile is still unable or unwilling to activate her phone (in place of the cheap LG that had been the 4th line).  1st 90-minute call to T Mobile tech support ended with them promising the new phone would be activated within 48 hours.  Second call, to check on status, ended with T Mobile rep saying that we needed to upgrade to a plan costing another $600 per year.  We are already paying for a 4-line Sprint plan!  At this point, since T Mobile essentially wants us to chose a new plan, we are doing so.  With a different carrier.  Disappointing, but not surprising, that we were lied to and then attempted to be cheated into a more costly plan. Dishonest to the extreme.
I give a 1 star because there is nothing lower,  90% of the time I have absolutely no service and I have a Galaxy S20 Ultra 5G so the phone is not the issue. I had better service when it was Sprint.

F*** THEM for trying to get me off of my Metro PCS account!! I have been with Metro for 4 years and paid on time every time. They and their merging with Metro PCS has caused me havoc. They keep trying to kick my off my fabulous Metro plan and to get $40 more a mo from me by trying to switch me to T mobile.

We wanted to switch our family service from Sprint to T-Mobile. We spent 2 hours in the store before they sent us home to come back the next day and it took 2 more hours to complete. I am having problems with the service, the store wait is long, they won't help me on the phone and they don't call back. This was a HUGE mistake and as soon as we can we are pulling the plug on T-Mobile. They advertise 5g but nothing has changed. I miss Sprint.
Can you give zero stars? Worst service I've ever had.

Terrible service, dropped calls, calls don't even go through sometimes. Cant hear the other party or they cant hear me is also occurring. rebooting helps only sometimes. We have 4 lines on our plan and new phones from t Mobile. The phones aren't the problem. What good is 5g if calls wont go through.  Maybe there should be an investigation into T mobile or a class action lawsuit.

edits.text: The worst phone service we have ever had from a cellular phone company. There 5G is worthless without actually connecting to the other party. Our biggest complaint is, the calls just don't go through. Nothing happens. The 2nd biggest problem is, if it does connect, we can't hear them or they can't hear us. We missed too many sales because of T-Mobile. I would give Zero rating if I could.

text: Sprint has always been satisfactory, since t mobile took over phone service has gone to crap. 1/2 mile out of town no service, Even on i75 nothing. Took phone back to store for settings check, everything is correct. T mobile’s service is not as advertised. 4 more months to go on contract, after 15 years taking my family’s 4 phones and going elsewhere.

T-mobile doesn't solve your issues! They give you more and then transfer you or hang up on you. Crap service half the time, sometimes you get a good representative but being real after 2 years I want to quit there BS service.

Tmobile has the WORSE customer service support ever!! The right hand has absolutely no clue what the left hand is doin! Hold times are ridiculous. Filed a claim over 9 days ago and I still have no phone. I've been on hold today for over 50 minutes, I've talked to 4 reps and still waiting on another idiot to take my call. I will be transferring my Tmobile number to Verizon, I'm sick of this BS....
WORST EVER SPRINT AND TMOBILE WORST EVER

I went to t-mobile 3 weeks ago and am very disappointed.  Store I went to told me I would have unlimited phone tablet and Hotspot for 70 dollars. After one week I noticed they never switched tablet over resulting in extra charge from verizon , after 5gb my Hotspot went to dialup speed of 600kbs. Went back  and my bill went up to 110 dollars. Samsung21 ultra  phone and Tablet still didn't work great going back to Verizon.   To unlock phone had to wait a hour on the phone.

t-mobile customer support is a joke. My phone was stolen in Barcelona and they have been useless. They won't ship my phone here. They reduced their hours of operation with some ridiculous excuse that it's covid-related and they love to tell their customer that there is nothing they can do, when even a trained chimp can mail things internationally. What a trash carrier! Thanks for nothing! I guess I'll just enjoy my trip abroad with no phone. I am sure they will still happily charge me at the end of the month regardless.

Was enticed with advertisements and best 5G coverage, not.  If you even a few miles out of metro area you have virtually no coverage with T-Mobile.   Also was convinced to get an LG Velvet phone as it was a good value and was a decent 5G phone according to the sales agent at the corporate store.  LG phone did not work well from the beginning then LG quit making phones, they also quit really supporting them as well.  Customer service is poor, just people reading off of screens and very few can fix anything.  Also found that if if the service rep could not fix problem they would just hang up and you would then have to set on hold for a rep up to a half and hour just to get back to a person.  Do not switch and be taken in by the ads.

My husband and I went to the T mobile store on 98th and slide near live oaks animal hotel.  We were extremely pleased with Johnathan and Jacob.  They both helped us get the best plan for us.  We got the 55+ plan which also gave us Netflix..   Those two were very knowledgeable and got our phones set up and stayed with us until we got everything to our satisfaction.  I would recommend this store to anyone.

Worst company ever. I urgently needed a new sim when i moved to Poland and i decided to visit the tmobile store close to my house. I requested the cheapest sim card but they gave me a monthly contract. I didn't realize because everything was in Polish only. Next month, the electricity at my house was cut and i decided to use my data. It wasn't working so i had to contact the support, again in Polish only. They had  blocked my account because i didn't pay on time. That's when i realized it was a contract. I requested the contract in pdf but it was written in Polish and they told me there is absolutely no way to break it. 
The money is not even worth it, the connection is extremely slow and unstable; sometimes not working at all. I have 15GB of useless data and 4 GB for roaming which  are of course used fast when on vacation. 
I told a friend and they agreed that tmobile is s*it and recommended Orange.

I've been a T-Mobile customer for 15 years. I've lived in the same place in SF the entire time and my network connection has gotten consistently worse over the last few months. Their customer service people are polite, but they aren't doing anything to fix the problem. Through some sleuthing, I've found out T-Mobile is renting tower space from AT&T and Verizon rather than putting in their own towers. They don't have enough bandwidth for my neighborhood so I'm randomly out of service and get download speeds on a 5G phone that are now like 2G at best.

T-Mobile is the worst carrier on the planet. I switched to them only because I wanted the Galaxy S21 ultra. I paid $1200 for the phone. But as I'm a trucker I travel to many states and literally EVERYWHERE I go... The service is TERRIBLE!! I bought a $500 signal booster for my truck and it helps sometimes but T-Mobile service is so bad that I still get bad signal alot of the time.. I went to Verizon to switch and guess what... MY PHONE THAT IS PAID FOR IN FULL IS LOCKED TO T-MOBILE AND THEY WONT UNLOCK IT!!! What a completely crap company.. A disgrace.. I'm disgusted by T-Mobile.. DO NOT SIGN UP FOR THIS CRAP SERVICE

My husband and I have been t-mobile customers for the last 15 years. We recently moved to derby ks, and have very poor service. We have contacted tmobile 3 times requesting a cell phone booster for our house, as we often have business calls in the evenings and have poor signal. We have been told three times they would send the booster out and we would have it the following week. It has yet to show, and we've been dealing with this for 4 weeks. We will most certainly be dropping them as our provider and switching to Verizon.

I was at the t-mobile store in Moses lake yesterday, after trying to fix a problem with mine and a friend's phone at Walmart in Ephrata and not getting any straight answers or help.
Devin was extremely polite and helpful. He has such a positive attitude, a willingness to help, and made the whole experience of getting new phones a pleasure

Always a Sprint customer. Went to store to buy out my lease on phone to lower bill. App indicated I could by it. T-Mobile told me I couldn’t but could save me money on a new plan.  Then when the bill came it was more than before, plus 400 out of pocket, and I had to give them my old phone!  Then I got a letter in the mail a week later telling me my lease is up buy out my phone!  SCAMMERS AND LIARS!  on top of that the service is awful. Slow and mostly unresponsive.  No joke ….it if lost network connect while filling out the customer survey!  What a joke. Go to Verizon. T-Mobile is worthless.

I was trying to unlock my phone and theses people keeps saying different things and nothing works my phone is Still currently locked. I have paid my bills and they say I haven't or I have to pay more. They are literally all over the place and not know what to do. It took my sister over 4 days to get her phone unlocked and this girl on the phone didn't know what she was doin. Bad business! T mobile sucks!!!
Terrible scammers and liars by existence without any sense of reality, all they want is to rip your pockets upside down and separate you out of your hard earned money.

I have had sprint for over 25 years.  I had them when I had my car phone and bag phone.  Since they merged, I have not had service where we travel.  I had never had that problem with Sprint.  No I don't have service more than I have service.  Worse network ever.

Decided to contact T-Mobile by chat! Worst customer service than contacting them by phone. Waited 10 minutes for a response. They are obviously helping other people. They cannot devote their attention to you. And then of course with the terrible phone service I have the chat got dropped! You will seriously regret getting T-Mobile service!

edits.text: They lie straight to your face. Supposedly they've been working on towers in my area for the last 4 months. You could build a brand new tower in 90 days. I have been complaining to T-Mobile since the first day I got there service. I so regret getting t-mobile. I am the dumbest idiot for reading other reviews probably sponsored by t-mobile. Don't make the mistake and get t-mobile. I have outages everywhere. Can't use my service at all.

They lie straight to your face! They tell you you're going to get a certain minimum of megabytes per second. And they lie straight to your face. It's appalling that the FCC does not do anything about it. This is the problem with my country. False advertising. Broken promises. And we all pay for it. When are we going to learn the consumer has the power. Put this company out of business.

text:
The worst since t mobile bought out sprint. Dropped calls. Slow text if any at some parts of day. Run you from on phone with them to store. Zero help cause did on phone cant help in store. Spent hours driving and running back and forth. Quoted new price for plan at $105 for over 55 years of age. Then get bill for $185! Liars, and miss representation. So done customer for 25 plus years. 
In my opinion. Their 5 G stands for...GOOD FOR 5 MINUTES!

T-Mobile just tried to rob me on my bill my bill was 189 now it’s $216 I asked the representative why my bill was so high when it supposed to be lower she told me I have to have auto pay to get five dollars off my bill I told her I don’t have it well it will stay at $200 if you don’t have the auto pay I said I’m not doing it I bring back your equipment and I got paid and now you’re trying to charge me more a lot of back-and-forth and I just told her I will pay the bill and I’m leaving T-Mobile  is trying to get over and they still want you to pay for equipment that you don’t have “ t-Mobile it’s highway  robbery”!! I’m so annoyed 😠 five years  my bill is so high so high makes no sense

As loyal Sprint customers for 20+ years (we switched once and hated it, so back to Sprint we went) we were saddened by the merger announcement. My  husband's phone died recently and we went to get a new on at T-mobile, our very first experience with them.  It didn't start out great, but between multiple staff members and Chris & Vikas over in the customer support phone center were a true pleasure to deal with.  We spent 6 hours in the T-mobile store and didn't even walk out with a working phone and we're still happy with the outcome and will be back tomorrow to get a new phone. We appreciate all the help and assistance in getting my husband back up on the grid.

I read reviews about their dishonest warehouse & YES I CAN RELATE. I gave them a 3 star because they at least fixed my monthly rate for 2 months now after i called this in 8 months ago. Soo for 8 times, ive had to call, explain MY SITUATION, & stay on the phone for about 20 minutes OR MORE with DIFFERENT ASSOCIATES before the last one literally had managed it for 2 months now. BUT, the previous phone is STILL not off my line. They should send it back to me since i paid it for so many months before they adjusted the prices.

We recently switched from Sprint to T-Mobile. Worst mistake that I have made with our cell phones. Horrible data and phone reception. Their customer service is, at least, from this country and they act like they are trying to help, but it is horrible service.
The MOST OVERRATED PHONE SERVICE with NO service and VERY EXPENSIVE !!!!!!!

The people who work at your call center to help customers are the worst people I have ever dealt with.  Obviously the people who work in your warehouse are very dishonest.  I have proof that I sent my phones in they have proof the package was received but oh!! No phones. 
Everyone who I have dealt with from the person who sold us our so called promotion to your warehouse are nothing but liars!! Once my phones are paid for I will go back to my previous company and never deal with Tmobile again!! I will do without a phone first!!

I don’t even wanna put 1 star if there was an option. The service is horrible. Ive been scammed by T-Mobile and now have a huge bill to pay which I am not going to. Don’t ever get free stuff from T-Mobile cuz it’s not free, eventually you have to pay for it and they don’t let you know until a year pass by and you get cancellation notice in mail. They are bad at solving problems and cancellation office I called hanged up on me 2 times cuz they don’t wanna solve the problem and T-Mobile don’t really care about customers. They hire bunch of people with no ability or understanding on how to solve problems. I highly do not recommend T-Mobile service at all, what a childish joke this is. The reason why I got a huge bill is because they said they never got the router back that was given me to use for free until I return it back which I did and they never got it haha probably trough it in the trash and waited a year to make me pay collection bill. That’s how they make money. Watch out for those situations. Very bad company and very ignorant.

I hate this company that I have been a customer of ten years and the horrible customer service that all are reading from the same script and rarely help.
I have been dealing with a nightmare for almost 6 months of these greedy crooks started charging me for FIVE SEPERATE LINES THAT I NEVER EVER ASKED FOR OR AGREED TO! FOR THE PAST 6 MONTHS MY BILLS KEEPS GETTING HIGHER AND HIGHER EVERY MONTH AT LEAST $100 INCREASE EVERY MONTH BECAUSE DESPITE ME TELLING THEM NUMEROUS TIMES SINCE MARCH TO TAKE OFF THE 5 LINES AND QUIT CHARGING ME FOR EXTRA LINES THAT THEY EVEN HAD NO EXPLANATION WHY IT WAS ON MY BILL....AND THEN I FOUND OUT LAST MONTH THAT THEY ALLOIWED 2 APPLE WATCHES TO BE FRAUDENTLY PURCHASED ON MY ACCOUNT AND I DON'T KNOW WHO WOULD DO THAT, SO NOW THERES FRAUD GOING ON WITH MY ACCOUNT AND ALLOWING THIS BS TO KEEP HAPPENING AND THEN BILLING ME FOR THE FRAUDELENT CHARGES AND PEOPLE PURCHASING EXPENSIVE WATCHES ON MY ACCOUNT!!
I HAVE HAD IT, I AM NOT GOING TO LET THESE JERKS STEAL FROM ME, AND BILL ME FOR LETTING RANDOM PEOPLE CHARGE DEVICES TO MY ACCOUNT, AND OVERCHARGING ME FOR 5 LINES EVERY MONTH AND I AM GOIN TO SEE WHAT LEGAL RIGHTS I HAVE UPON TMOBILE INTENTIONALLY TRYING TO EXTORT MONEY FROM ME AND WILL SHUT OFF MY SERVICE IF I DONT PAY FOR ALL THESE OVERCHARGES...I HATE HATE HATE TMOBILE, AND I WOULDN'T RECOMMEND TMOBILE TO SOMEBODY I DESPISED BECAUSE THEY ARE SOLELY OUT TO TAKE ALL THE MONEY THEY CAN TAKE FROM BILLING YOU FOR FALSE CHARGES, AND CHECK YOUR BILL THOROUGHLY TO MAKE SURE THIS DOESNT HAPPEN TO YOU LIKE THE NIGHTMARE IM DEALING WITH THIS STUPID COMPANY.

I have been a Sprint customer for over 20 years, no problems.  T mobile takes over and tell me I have to change my sim card to keep service.  As soon as I changed the sim I lost all service, cannot make a call, cannot connect to internet, lost all my lifelong photos.  Needless to say, 1 week later I am changing service providers.  Yes it is costing me more $ but why would I pay less for a service that I cant even get.  Going to Spectrum mobile, at least their customer service reps speak english.  Bottom line, F,  T MOBILE

I am furious I call in to discuss my bill for months to find out they have a plan that is 40 dollars cheaper than the one PLAN IM GRANDFATHERED IN GRANDFATHERED makes you assume that you are getting a good deal that is no longer offered come to find out I was paying 40 dollars more than the new plans that are being offered the only difference is Netflix so I was paying 40 dollars more for Netflix I brought this to a supervisors attention he says I have to ask for it ok how am I to ask for it when I have no knowledge of the new plans then get this when I 1st signed up for t-mobile 5+ years ago my plan WAS 120 but it conveniently went up to 147 so you mean to tell me that they can increase your bil without asking but not lower it without the customer asking then I was promised a plan that I was not giving as a company I should not have to give suggestions nor tips on how to treat your loyal on time paying customers 5+ years ive never made a late payment paid off several phones and equipment why would I ever give them a referral when this is how they treat there loyal customers I want a company who recognizes and appreciates there loyal long time customers
Gave me a 2 year contact instead of 1 as I asked. Perverse sales incentives make this a disgusting company.

Switching from AT&T to T-Mobile was THE WORST DECISION THAT WE MADE! Dropped calls all of the time! No internet connection! Can’t make calls most of the time! They claim that they are working on towers... But yet, they have no problem billing for their crap service!  T-Mobile is a big SCAM!!! Don’t 
Waste your time or money on their service!

I’ve been a Sprint customer for more than 15 years, and have never encountered some of the issues and overcharging that I have since the merge with T-Mobile. After upgrading my phone at the beginning of the year, I requested a return package to send back my old phone as I’ve always done in the past. I waited a while and it never showed up, so I called again to put in a second request because they also had the nerve to continue charging me a monthly fee for the device, and I volunteered to send it back. This time, the rep I spoke to, tells me all I have to pay is $86.17 and I could just keep the phone. So I agreed only to find out the representative was lying to me just to get my money, what was owed to keep the phone was closer to $400, and they were STILL CHARGING ME!!!!😡😡😡 I called and made a 3rd request for the return kit and some sort of refund or bill adjustment because I felt I was wrongfully being charged for a phone I clearly didn’t want and wasn’t using! This rep tells me I HAVE to go online or on the app and request the return kit, they can’t do that over the phone?!?!?! Never heard that in my entire life, and I’ve been dealing with cell phone for 20+ years, but ok. Needless to say I was never able to do that so I called again to tell that, and tell them to send me one to my house because at this point I’m extremely frustrated and on the verge of looking for a new service provider because this whole ordeal have been a ridiculous ploy to make me purchase a phone I don’t want!!! I’m done, as soon as I find a better deal I’m saying goodbye to them for GOOD!!!

Unfortunately, I cannot express a 
“0” star.

T-Mobile vs Sprint, there is no competition! I am disappointed 😔- I have been with Sprint for over 10 years and never have I had any issues with purchasing products, their service, not to mention their customer service. I Thought the merging process would be a continuance of the business relations with Sprint, but like I’ve always known why I never chose T-Mobile as my business preference! I had just finished paying off a phone I originally purchased through Sprint, and was ready to pay my monthly bill (Note: The month they merged) T-Mobile tells me that I still owe my monthly pymnt for the phone + my monthly bill🤷🏻‍♀️! The phone!!! I was done paying it! So, they tried to lower the pymnt, but were still overcharging and they insisted that I still owed for the phone. I explained to them that I had my receipt from that purchase and that I was done paying for the phone. They completely ignored what I stated and continued by adding months to the contract and that their contracts (now T-Mobile, had been updated). They continuously insisted that my contract for the phone was not completed. 
Consequently, I left that terrible company, was willing to pay what I knew I owed, but T-Mobile was not merging; sending emails and statements with excessive amounts! Additionally, I no longer had their service. They are still harassing me (Now, with a collections company) and charging me for the last three (3 months!) 
Note: I have not used that service since April! Thieves! I have to pay them as they are destroying my credit reputation and intricately threaten to keep charging me unless I pay what they request.
 T-Mobile is in no way congruent!

 Remove Sprint from your logo name!

I am a long time Sprint user. Last 2 months my bill has gone up despite any change on my end in our phone usage. After years of staying under the data limit, my bill now say both my son's phone and my usage rose more than 100%. I now have overage charges. I looked into getting on the 55+ plan with T Mobile, because they offer unlimited data for a moderate increase in what I am paying now for 6g. I have been getting nothing but a run around. Sprint customer representatives were always helpful in offering various options in saving me money on my plans. Now they offer 1 basic plan that will cost $60 more per month. 
I contacted a Sprint representative and they offered the 55+ discount for seniors. I sent them an email with my proof of age and they responded that I need to subscribe to the 55+ plan. Duh, that is what I was trying to do. So I went on the TMobile site and logged in. There was no way to add the 55+ plan to my account. So I emailed Sprint back and they told me I needed to send proof of my age, like they never got it the first time. It is like a big circular waste of time dealing with this new merger.

If I could give a 0 star rating I would.... hands down worst phone company on the planet .. they have turned into the biggest scam artists in the world.. you can't even go into a store to turn your phone off.. they have made it virtually impossible for you to get rid of their service you have to call the customer service to turn your phone off.. if you walk into a store and ask for any help at all they just ignore you unless you're going to spend money and buy a phone their customer service is the worst on the planet !!! thank God I've switched to Verizon

I would give 0 stars if that was an option. T-Mobile's internet service is ridiculously slow. Apps take forever to load. I can't get a stable internet connection AT MY OWN HOUSE, with or without Wi-Fi. Sometimes I'll try calling someone several times only to later learn none of the calls ever went through. Sometimes my phone hangs up on its own mid-call; it's happened twice today alone. Sometimes the audio cuts out a few seconds into the call. In fact, these things happen almost on a regular basis! And it doesn't stop there. Today I tried updating an app, waited about 45 minutes for it to download (it shouldn't take that long), and once it was almost done, it made me start the whole update over again. It happened 3 times. I've been trying for 3 hours to update the app. In short, they completely wasted my time. 
Messages take forever to send, videos won't load, calls won't go through, trying to update apps is a downright infuriating process-- I could go on, but you get the idea. The service is just atrocious. T-Mobile please get your s**t together or my family will have to switch, and it surely won't be long before others get tired of your BS and decide to do the same.

THE ABSOLUTE WORST CUSTOMER SERVICE EXPERIENCE I HAVE EVER DEALT WITH!!!! SPRINT USED TO BE REALLY GOOD AT CUSTOMER SERVICE AND SINCE THIS MERGER- ITS BEEN AWFUL!!!! I AM LEAVING SPRINT/TMOBILE SINCE BEING A CUSTOMER SINCE 2007!!!!

FOR THE ATTENTION OF..... Callie Field (Senior Vice President of Customer Service)

Dear madam,

Please accept this email as a very serious complaint against one of your employees in Tucson, AZ    (store at 4631 N Oracle Rd, Tucson, AZ 85705)

The employee's name is UNNO, regarding this complaint. At least, that's the name he was displaying on his red work shirt.

I would also like you to note that I am a 72 Yr. old senior citizen, who has also had major heart by-pass surgery and also had a "pace-maker" implant 3 Yrs. ago.

In my working life - I also have 50+ Yrs in Business Management and Sales Manager experience.... (Customer Service were priorities!)

On the 1st of July, I went into your store to purchase a new phone, as I had previously been out-of-the-country for 5 Yrs, so I needed a new phone.

I purchased a Samsung Galaxy 12 phone and on 07/02 my bank acct. was debited $45.66. Also, another $44.01 was debited from my bank account. on 07/20, which I did not understand. I never received a reply about that charge, because of what transpired very quickly after my store arrival. Please continue. 
 
A week after my phone purchase, I had to see my Cardiologist. for a scheduled Appt. My Dr. was not happy that I had this new phone, because for people with "pace-makers" they can be problems, he said to me.

So I decided to return the phone on Wednesday 07/22, back to the same store where I purchased it. I asked for the MOD (Manager-on-Duty).

This is where the entire incident gets very nasty for me (the customer) as this guy UNNO said he could help me! I asked him if he was the Manager - but he never replied. 

After explaining my situation, he said he could do NOTHING for me, because 14 days had passed. No one told me about a 14 day "rule" when I purchased the phone. In fact, I was never even given a "Contract" - which I thought was strange. 

He also displayed an unfriendly and unsmiling attitude with me - an attitude of I don't care what your Doctor said! I told him that HIS whole attitude was "out-of-order" and I would give T-Mobile a bad "Google Review" on the Internet and contact the Corporate office - which I have done with you! 

This is when the situation became "absurd"....Because he ordered me out of the store, because I was threatening him with my Google review and contacting you, he said.
 
He next said that if I did not immediately leave - he was going to call the POLICE! Needless to say, I was literally *STUNNED*! I could not believe what I was hearing, and I thought I was going to have a *Heart attack*! He even started to wave his phone in my face and threatened me several times, with the police! 

Ms. Field - in my 72 Yrs. on this planet, I have NEVER received such treatment before, anywhere, and anytime. This person representing T-Mobile is an absolute disaster and has NO idea about real *Customer Service*! He is certainly not an asset for your business.

He needs to be very strictly disciplined or even dismissed for this very diabolical and irrational behavior towards a customer - your "life-blood" in a competitive business.  

As the Senior Vice President of Customer Service - I thought you should be fully informed about these events. I have also copied Mr. Mike Sievert, your CEO, into the email. 

Your call center in Manilla, the Philippines, also found the events very disturbing. (Romeo)

NOTE: This SENIOR VICE PRESIDENT or CEO never directly replied to my email - she had a subordinate contact me! Also, they even had the "nerve" to send the unwanted phone back to me, by UPS! I eventually was able to cancel and return the phone + I was compensated for the original charge!!

I went to a Columbus location upper Arlington a suburb of Columbus Ohio. I went to a T-Mobile there and the kids that help me his name was Chase and Charles.
